comment.body:
don't consider too much significance...
the collar is just another overhyped part of the structure.
plus the collar is designed to be delta neutral when it's get RESET, not ROLLED

the collar is not rolling.
they set the new collar at 2pm, and delta hedge it via an itm call,
and let the old one expire.
it is written in their papers
comment.raw_body:
